proofPoints.headline: Demos of all social platforms
proofPoints.description: See what Europe's social entrepreneurs are building right now. Learn from one another's products, business models, and approaches within the different categories, e.g. networking, events, etc.

proofPoints.headline: Focused Keynotes
proofPoints.description: Focused perspectives from pioneers of social platforms, Rebuild ambassadors and current day platform entrepreneurs on everything from challenges to product innovation and scaling approaches.

proofPoints.headline: Overcoming shared challenges
proofPoints.description: Working groups tackling the problems no entrepreneurs should face alone. Bring your toughest questions. Build solutions together. With live support from digital pioneers, early builders, and visionary investors.

proofPoints.headline: Collaborative Outcomes
proofPoints.description: Hands-on prototyping of a set of actionable tools needed to build a new direction for social platforms. Think design principles, investment concept papers, opportunity maps.

cta.text: Request an invitation to join the first gathering

proofPoints.headline: Keynotes by pioneers
proofPoints.description: Hear from Margrethe Vestager, Thomas Madsen-Mygdal and local capacities Christian Lindholm and Marko Ahtisaari, and more. Focused perspectives on what it takes to build platforms that last and how we win.

proofPoints.headline: Forty lessons by practitioners
proofPoints.description: Structured teaching from practitioners in the field. Founders, designers, technologists and investors sharing what they know about building, scaling, and designing social platforms — the decisions that worked, and the ones that didn't.

proofPoints.headline: Kids building platforms
proofPoints.description: A parallel track for the next generation. Kids learn to think about how social platforms are built, what they do, and what they could become. Then, they get to direct the building of some.

proofPoints.headline: Social dinner and evening sessions
proofPoints.description: The work doesn't stop when the sessions end. Two evenings of shared dinners and open conversation — the connections that matter most often happen here. And in Helsinki, that means sauna too.

faq.question: How much does it cost to attend?
faq.answer: Rebuild 2 is an invitation-only gathering. Attendance is free for accepted participants. Travel and accommodation are the responsibility of each attendee.

faq.question: Am I guaranteed a spot when I register?
faq.answer: No. Requesting an invitation does not guarantee a spot. We review all applications and reach out to those selected. We aim to curate a group of people who collectively make the gathering as valuable as possible.

faq.question: Who are the other attendees?
faq.answer: Founders, designers, engineers, investors, and researchers building or backing Europe's next generation of social platforms. We keep the group small and intentional.

faq.question: Where exactly is the venue?
faq.answer: Helsinki, Finland. Venue details are shared with confirmed attendees closer to the event.

faq.question: What should I prepare?
faq.answer: Come ready to share what you're building. There will be structured sessions, but the most valuable moments tend to come from open conversation. Bring questions you can't answer alone.

cta.text: Request an invitation to the gathering

proofPoints.headline: Mobilising Europeans to shift
proofPoints.description: A coordinated awareness with all European media to share the platforms and progress emerging from the industry. Designed to build momentum and readiness ahead of the Big Shift Day.

proofPoints.headline: Top 20 case studies
proofPoints.description: A curated look at the biggest breakthroughs and cases to learn from. Making it usable for the wider industry.

proofPoints.headline: Designing the next decade to come
proofPoints.description: Defining the actions, priorities, and structures that will guide the industry forward. The starting point for long-term collaboration and commitment.

proofPoints.headline: Sunsetting Rebuild - Open sourcing the resources
proofPoints.description: A clear and intentional close to the one-year catalyst initiative. Releasing Rebuild, open sourcing all resources, so the industry can continue with its own momentum.

cta.text: Sign up to our newsletter for updates
